reasoning: Lactate clearance is your main limiter and crucial for improving your power over the Alpine Loop's demanding climbs. After yesterday's lighter session at 66% FTP, you're recovered and ready to push. This workout will enhance your fatigue resistance, thereby elevating your ability to maintain power through the longer climb of Emigration Canyon.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 min Over-Unders: Alternate 2 min at 201-218W with 2 min at 242-256W, 3 min easy spin between each block

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
